## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy and freelancer acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Async Sync:** The sync is now async, as key Surge stakeholders (Jason & Nancy) are traveling.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - **Content Strategy Blocked:** GrowthX's content strategy is stalled by a lack of freelancer data. The current approval rate (\<5%) is too low to identify a high-quality "ideal profile," making it impossible to target content effectively.
  - [**Article Status:** The internal "How to Work Without Feedback" article is ready for final review. It requires significant edits to be made public.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Topics

### Freelancer Acquisition Data Gap

  - [GrowthX needs to understand the "ideal profile" of a successful Surge freelancer to optimize content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - **Problem:** The current approval rate for freelancers completing the starter assessment is \<5%.
      - [This low rate makes it impossible to identify patterns or reliable indicators of success from initial signups.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [GrowthX cannot determine which content categories (e.g., developer, data labeling) attract high-quality applicants.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jeansalazar confirmed Nancy and Jason have this data and should be consulted.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

### "How to Work Without Feedback" Article

  - [The article, edited by Sarah, is complete and ready for final review.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Purpose:** Internal guide for Surge freelancers.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Public Use:** Requires significant edits to be suitable for public release, as its current content is too specific to Surge's internal processes.](https://fathom.video/share/UP_3tFnHkCefst6RR6CsRgDVMGbg5Lmg?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
